problems_encountered.description: Tool disabled in MCP server - conversation endpoints return 403 Forbidden (no OAuth scope support, admin-only)

tool_response_summary: Tool is not available for execution. All conversation/* tools are disabled in the MCP server because the Mittwald API conversation endpoints require admin-only access and do not support OAuth scopes.
execution_notes: This tool was marked as 'skipped' in the eval prompt metadata (line 31-32). The conversation endpoints are not accessible via OAuth tokens and require admin credentials. This is a known limitation documented in the eval prompt itself. No execution attempted as the tool is intentionally disabled.
